name: ast-grep
description: ast-grep — CLI tool for AST-based structural code search, linting, and rewriting across multiple languages.

seo.title: ast-grep — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: ast-grep: ast-grep — CLI tool for AST-based structural code search, linting, and rewriting across multiple languages.

when_to_use: Searching code by structure rather than text patterns across repos
Running AST-based lint rules for custom code style enforcement
Automating large-scale structural refactors with rewrite rules
Finding all usages of a code pattern across multi-language repos

pros: AST-based matching avoids regex false positives
Fast Rust implementation scales to large monorepos
Supports structural rewrites across many languages
YAML rule files are readable and shareable
cons: Pattern syntax has a real learning curve
Less IDE integration than semgrep or comby
review.verdict: The best open-source structural search tool right now, worth the learning curve for any serious refactor.
review.best_for: Engineers doing codemods, lint rules, or codebase-wide refactors across languages
review.not_for: Users who just need simple text search or one-off find-and-replace
